appliedUpdates.description: Added Docker validation commands to .factory/services.yaml: docker_build_local and docker_validate_stack for consistent Docker milestone verification.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Include docker-stack.yml explicitly in Docker/infrastructure scope examples so workers know Swarm stack files are covered.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docker-swarm-stack review noted the skill currently lists Dockerfile/docker-compose/.dockerignore but not docker-stack.yml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a brief convention note that Docker Swarm deployment config lives in docker-stack.yml and should be validated with docker compose -f docker-stack.yml config.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docker-swarm-stack review found no mention of docker-stack.yml in project AGENTS guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For regression/smoke validation tasks, require explicit expected-behavior-to-check mapping (including whether evidence must be visual/browser snapshot vs indirect grep).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: regression-ui-smoke review found one assertion only indirectly checked via grep, and another observed as likely no-route without explicit confirmation framing.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dockerfile EXPOSE 3000 vs local .env PORT=3001 mismatch could confuse workers.
